# Curvachip LLC

> Curvachip LLC is a single-developer software company building privacy-first apps for Apple platforms. All apps are distributed on the Apple App Store. The company is led by Michael S., its founder, CEO, and sole developer.

## Website pages

- [Home](https://curvachip.com/): Overview of the company, featured apps, values, and testimonial.
- [Apps](https://curvachip.com/apps): All apps distributed by Curvachip — Shadow Task, TipZap, StoneClip, BugClip, PlantClip, Grocery Wiz, and Tally Snap — with descriptions, features, and App Store links.
- [Privacy](https://curvachip.com/privacy): Overview of Curvachip's privacy practices, per-app privacy labels, and links to all legal documents.
- [Contact](https://curvachip.com/contact): Developer contact information and a direct email link.
- [About](https://curvachip.com/about): Company mission, vision, values, timeline, and leadership.

## App detail pages

- [Shadow Task](https://curvachip.com/apps/shadow-task): Pomodoro timer and focus tracker. Fully on-device. iOS, iPadOS, macOS.
- [TipZap](https://curvachip.com/apps/tipzap): Tip calculator with bill splitting and tipping guides for 8 countries. Fully on-device. iOS, iPadOS.
- [StoneClip](https://curvachip.com/apps/stoneclip): AI-powered rock, gem, and crystal identifier. iOS, iPadOS.
- [BugClip](https://curvachip.com/apps/bugclip): AI-powered insect and spider identifier. iOS, iPadOS.
- [PlantClip](https://curvachip.com/apps/plantclip): AI-powered plant, flower, and mushroom identifier. iOS, iPadOS.
- [Grocery Wiz](https://curvachip.com/apps/grocery-wiz): Smart grocery list with tagging and category sections. Fully on-device. iOS, iPadOS.
- [Tally Snap](https://curvachip.com/apps/tally-snap): Click counter with haptic feedback and Apple Watch support. Fully on-device. iOS, watchOS.

## Privacy policies (per app)

- [Shadow Task Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-shadow-task): Data Not Collected.
- [TipZap Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-tipzap): Data Not Collected.
- [StoneClip Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-stoneclip): Data Not Linked to You.
- [BugClip Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-bugclip): Data Not Linked to You.
- [PlantClip Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-plantclip): Data Not Linked to You.
- [Grocery Wiz Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-grocery-wiz): Data Not Collected.
- [Tally Snap Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/apps/privacy-tally-snap): Data Not Collected.

## Legal

- [Website Privacy Policy](https://curvachip.com/privacy/website): No cookies, no tracking, no analytics. Static site. Mailto form only.
- [Terms of Use](https://curvachip.com/privacy/terms-of-use): Terms governing curvachip.com and all Curvachip apps.

## Blog

- [What You Share with AI Chatbots Stays There](https://curvachip.com/privacy/blog/ai-chatbots): Article on the data risks of cloud AI services and how to use them safely.

## Markdown versions

Each page on this site has a companion markdown file at the same path with `.md` appended:
- https://curvachip.com/about.md
- https://curvachip.com/apps.md
- https://curvachip.com/privacy.md
- https://curvachip.com/contact.md

Or send `Accept: text/markdown` to any page URL — the HTML response includes a
`<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` header pointing to the markdown version.

## Full site content

A single file containing all site content in markdown:
https://curvachip.com/llms-full.txt
